ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy (e.g., HKLM) */,
  "policy_group" TEXT /* The registry key or group associated with the policy */,
  "policy_setting" TEXT /* Specific setting of the policy for the web browser */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the policy */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the policy setting */,
  "recommended_value" TEXT /* Recommended value for compliance */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the policy is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the policy */,
  "compliance_data" TEXT /* Compliance data for the specific version of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if this is the current active version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_versions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, auditor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modified policy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the policy setting before the action */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the policy setting after the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_audits_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department for which the report was generated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance status */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if applicable) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
